## What changed

Brief description of the change. Link the issue if there is one.

## Why

What problem this solves, or what capability it adds.

## Test impact

- [ ] New tests added (describe what they cover)
- [ ] Existing tests updated (describe why)
- [ ] No test changes (justify)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally
- [ ] JSDoc on any new public exports
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing
